summary: High‑energy Spring ’77 show with smoking sets and a solid soundboard capture despite minor technical quirks.
review: Both reviewers rave about the performance, calling it a hot spring‑tour outing with an electric first set and a tight 20‑minute Scarlet > Fire sequence that leads into a soaring Other One. The recording is a soundboard source that sounds well mixed overall, though one reviewer notes some technical hiccups.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews give 5‑star ratings and praise the musical performance; only minor recording issues are mentioned, leading to a near‑excellent overall score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear mix with Donna Jean’s vocals well balanced; reviewers note some technical difficulties but they do not detract significantly from listening.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic first set with strong song choices, followed by a tight 20‑minute Scarlet > Fire segue and an inspired Other One that showcase the band’s playfulness and momentum.
